title: ocotea tenera
intro: Ocotea tenera, also known as Bolivian Sandalwood, is a small evergreen tree native to the Andes mountains in South America, prized for its aromatic wood and medicinal properties. The plant is rich in beta-eudesmol, a compound with known anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ocotea tenera include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and night sweats. The herbal preparations of Ocotea tenera typically include essential oil, tea, or capsules, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce inflammation, and support overall well-being.
